  4. Disruptive Speakers with Bureau du Réel
inspiration Leadership development

Disruptive Speakers with Bureau du Réel

Speakers with high transmission power, for conferences designed as missions around niche expertise.

All Leaders Initiative offers a disruptive speakers programme that deliberately breaks with the star-system of large B2B agencies. The principle: replace media notoriety with authenticity of journey and niche expertise, for interventions that transform sustainably rather than impress momentarily.

Exceptional speakers

Selected speakers — special forces officers, polar explorers, nuclear safety experts, avant-garde choreographers, niche sport athletes — are practitioners of daily demand and risk. These are, according to All Leaders Initiative's formula, inspiration passers-on who don't realise it. Their legitimacy comes from the field, not from platforms.

Disruptive format

The format also breaks with the classic 60-minute conference: interventions favour immersive and experiential formats — masterclasses, integration workshops of 3 to 7 hours, collective debriefs — following a storyliving principle: lived experience as a vector of transformation, rather than simple storytelling. Preferred themes cover leadership in chaotic environments, error culture in risk settings and crew performance under pressure.

Transparent pricing

Pricing is transparent and accessible, breaking with the opaque margins of the market.

Key topics

  • ✓ Field experts, not media stars
  • ✓ Storyliving — live the message, don't listen to it
  • ✓ Immersive formats of 3 to 7 hours
  • ✓ High-value niches — risk, demand, chaos
  • ✓ Transparent pricing, maximum impact
Get in touch
